title: ixeris transnokoensis
intro: Ixeris transnokoensis, also known as the Korean dandelion or Korean hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used in Korean medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ixeris transnokoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support liver health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Ixeris transnokoensis can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional Korean medicine.
